testcase.name: test_a1_rate_limit_forgot_password
testcase.failure: tests/test_password_reset_and_ratelimit.py:75: in test_a1_rate_limit_forgot_password assert last.status_code == 429, f"Expected 429 on 6th call, got {last.status_code}: {last.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 on 6th call, got 200: {"ok":true,"message":"Als dit e-mailadres bestaat, sturen we een resetlink."} E assert 200 == 429 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_a2_rate_limit_register_donateur
testcase.failure: tests/test_password_reset_and_ratelimit.py:91: in test_a2_rate_limit_register_donateur assert last.status_code == 429, f"Expected 429 on 11th call, got {last.status_code}: {last.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 on 11th call, got 409: {"detail":"Dit e-mailadres is al geregistreerd"} E assert 409 == 429 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_a3_rate_limit_login
testcase.failure: tests/test_password_reset_and_ratelimit.py:102: in test_a3_rate_limit_login assert last.status_code == 429, f"Expected 429 on 6th call, got {last.status_code}: {last.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 on 6th call, got 401: {"detail":"Onjuist e-mailadres of wachtwoord"} E assert 401 == 429 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
